title: shiyth #7896
definition:
1) to put, set
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to put, lay (hand upon)
        1a2) to set, station, appoint, fix, set mind to
        1a3) to constitute, make (one something), make like, perform
        1a4) to take one's stand
        1a5) to lay waste
    1b) (Hophal) to be imposed, be set upon
nasbUsage:
